title: Coretext Experience Graph Ledger
description: The deterministic, typed edge graph mapping system state, active agents, and code to architectural intent and historical provenance.

source.description: The source file path or glob pattern (e.g., agent prompt, source code file).

target.description: The target file path being linked to.

type.description: Defines how Coretext routes the target context. 'docs': Mandatory full-text injection (targets docs/ or ARCHITECTURE.md). 'skills': Mandatory full-text injection (targets .agents/skills/). 'knowledge': Passive hint injection by filename only (targets knowledge/). 'templates': Mandatory full-text injection (targets templates/). 'archive': Ignored during execution; used for historical provenance tracking (targets docs/archive/).
